name: Almond Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and 2 tablespoons of sugar until smooth.
2. Add the almond extract and flour to the mixture. Mix well.
3. Shape the dough into long rolls about 1/2 inch in diameter.
4. Cut the rolls into 2-inch lengths.
5. Brush each piece with an egg white mixed with water.
6. Roll each piece in a combination of almonds and 1/2 cup sugar.
7. Place the bars on a well-greased baking sheet.
8. Bake at 350°F for about 12 minutes, or until golden brown.
9. Remove from the pan immediately after baking.
Makes 5 to 6 servings.
